_readme: Repeatability needs NO ground truth: grade each card N times, measure grade/subgrade spread.
Accuracy uses `expected` (+/- tolerance) where we have a defensible human grade.
expected/tolerance are best-judgment anchors — refine with your own grades over time.
Run: npx tsx scripts/repeatability-harness.ts [N]     (default N=3; resumable)
Old seed cards 93ee95e7 (Pineiro) + bb0259ab (Gengar) were DELETED from the DB — replaced below.
2026-07-10: added 5 cards from the grade-10-influx investigation (docs/GRADING_TEN_INFLUX_2026-07-10.md):
- two repeat-flap cards (same card graded 10 AND 7 from different shots within the hour),
- a cased card that scored 10 through rigid plastic, and two glare-foil 10s.
Their `expected` anchors the pre-fix over-graded value DOWN to the defensible grade.

cards.label: Eddy Pineiro Donruss (obvious horizontal crease + warp, both faces)
cards.note: STRUCTURAL anchor — must be caught every run

cards.label: 1992-93 UD Shaq (minor corner/surface whitening; owner 8, PSA-realistic 7)
cards.note: genuine-minor-wear anchor — the recall case. Expected revised 7→8 (2026-07-10): the owner's own grade is 8 and is the best-sourced ground truth we hold; 'PSA-realistic 7' was editorial. Watch: must never reach 10

cards.label: 1991 Fleer Michael Jordan (in-app camera, clean, well-centered)
cards.note: clean-Gem control — strict gate must NOT over-demote a true unanimous 10

cards.label: Andre/Hogan WrestleMania III (clean, glossy black bg)
Saddam Desert Storm Pro Set (vintage, faint corner texture)
Giratina (Pokemon) — repeat-flap: same card graded 10,10,10 and 7,7,8 within an hour (Jul 8)
cards.note: FLAP anchor (this shot graded 7). Sibling shots 0a5dc59c/80d3fd89/149a2a7a graded 10. Expected = middle of the defensible range; a 10 on this card is over-grade

cards.label: Aaron Rodgers (Sports) — repeat-flap: graded 7 here, 10 on a re-shoot 30 min later (Jul 8)
cards.note: FLAP anchor (this shot graded 7; sibling 3c617332 graded 10). A 10 is over-grade

cards.label: Roberto Clemente Topps Chrome /99 — graded 10 THROUGH a rigid plastic display case (Jul 10)
cards.note: CASED anchor — condition cannot be verified through the holder; Gem 10 must be withheld (fix B). Pre-fix engine gave 10/10/10/10

cards.label: Jasson Dominguez Bowman Chrome (heavy glare band across foil front) — unanimous 10 pre-fix
cards.note: GLARE-FOIL anchor — surface/corners partially glare-obscured; a confirmed 10 is not defensible from this shot

cards.label: Xerosic (Pokemon) — customer-reported: graded 10 by v9.3 (Jul 10) despite clear back edge/corner whitening; owner says 6-7
cards.note: PERCEPTION-FP anchor (unanimous over-grade class the gates can't catch). Back shows scattered whitening on left edge + TL/BL corners, visible at native res. Model dismissed the owner's condition report ('not confirmed in photos'). Production baseline: 10, confidence A, no zoom findings

cards.label: Gengar (Pokemon) — FALSE-CREASE anchor: graded 4 (crease 'detected' in the back swirl's printed streaks) then 9 on re-shoot 5 min later (Jul 16)
cards.note: Visually verified clean (back Q3 shows only the printed swirl streaks + sheen). Correlated holistic completions co-hallucinated the crease and verify confirmed it evidence-free; zoom found ZERO structural. Any structural cap on this card = regression. Sibling 2ac8c60d graded 9

cards.label: Koby EB04-044 (One Piece manga foil) — non-unanimous 10 ([10,10,9] passes, kept 10 via escape hatch)
cards.note: ESCAPE-HATCH anchor — strict unanimity gate (fix A) should demote this to 9
